message:
Wire missing isRefreshing/isFailed in 14 cards + fix memory leak (#4584)

Destructure isRefreshing, isFailed, and consecutiveFailures from data
hooks and pass them to useCardLoadingState() in 14 cards:

- DeploymentStatus: add isRefreshing
- ClusterChangelog: add isRefreshing
- HelmHistory: wire existing historyRefreshing
- ISO27001Audit: add isRefreshing
- GPUWorkloads: add isRefreshing, isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- HelmValuesDiff: wire isRefreshing, add isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- NamespaceQuotas: add isRefreshing, isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- ResourceMarshall: add isRefreshing, isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- BuildpacksStatus: add isRefreshing
- ConsoleOfflineDetectionCard: add isRefreshing, isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- GPUNamespaceAllocations: add isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- GPUStatus: add isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- LLMModels: add isFailed, consecutiveFailures
- NamespaceEvents: add isFailed, consecutiveFailures

Also fix memory leak in UnstructuredFilePreview: store setTimeout in
useRef and clear on unmount.

Update card-loading-standard test: remove fixed cards from
KNOWN_VIOLATIONS and KNOWN_FAILURE_VIOLATIONS, lower ratchet baselines
(75->65 total, 27->17 refresh, 52->34 failure).

Fixes #4507, #4509, #4510, #4512, #4517, #4518, #4519, #4520, #4521, #4522, #4523, #4524, #4525, #4526, #4561, #4563, #4566

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

   } = useCachedGPUNodes(cluster)
   const { drillToCluster } = useDrillDownActions()

+    consecutiveFailures,

     findings: cachedFindings,
     isLoading: cachedLoading,
+    isRefreshing: cachedRefreshing,
     isDemoFallback,
     isFailed: cachedFailed,
     consecutiveFailures: cachedFailures,
@@ -113,13 +114,15 @@ export function ISO27001Audit({ config }: ISO27001AuditProps) {
     [useDemoData, cachedFindings]
   )
   const isLoading = useDemoData ? false : cachedLoading
+  const isRefreshing = useDemoData ? false : cachedRefreshing
   const isFailed = useDemoData ? false : cachedFailed
   const consecutiveFailures = useDemoData ? 0 : cachedFailures
 
   // 4. Report card state
   const hasData = rawFindings.length > 0
   const { showSkeleton, showEmptyState } = useCardLoadingState({
     isLoading: isLoading && !hasData,
+    isRefreshing,
     isDemoData: isDemoMode || isDemoFallback,
     hasAnyData: hasData,
     isFailed,

@@ -411,7 +396,7 @@ describe('Card Loading State Gold Standard', () => {
       // This number MUST ONLY DECREASE. If you fix a card, remove it from
       // KNOWN_VIOLATIONS and decrease this count. If this test fails because
       // the count dropped, that's great — update the expected count!
-      const EXPECTED_KNOWN_VIOLATION_COUNT = 75
+      const EXPECTED_KNOWN_VIOLATION_COUNT = 65
       expect(totalKnown).toBeLessThanOrEqual(EXPECTED_KNOWN_VIOLATION_COUNT)
     })

       // Separate ratchet for isRefreshing violations. MUST ONLY DECREASE.
-      const EXPECTED_REFRESH_VIOLATION_COUNT = 27
+      const EXPECTED_REFRESH_VIOLATION_COUNT = 17
       expect(refreshCount).toBeLessThanOrEqual(EXPECTED_REFRESH_VIOLATION_COUNT)
     })

-      const EXPECTED_FAILURE_VIOLATION_COUNT = 52
+      const EXPECTED_FAILURE_VIOLATION_COUNT = 34
